name: pinecone-memory-skill
description: Minimal CLI for Pinecone memory skill

scripts.sync: node tools/pinecone-memory.mjs sync --index openclaw-memory --namespace default --path MEMORY.md --path memory --verify-write true
scripts.query: node tools/pinecone-memory.mjs query --index openclaw-memory --namespace default --text 用户偏好
scripts.heartbeat: node tools/pinecone-memory.mjs heartbeat --index openclaw-memory --namespace default --write-probe true
scripts.cleanup: node tools/pinecone-memory.mjs cleanup --index openclaw-memory --namespace default --confirm yes
scripts.backup: node tools/pinecone-memory.mjs backup --path MEMORY.md --path memory --output backup/pinecone-memory-backup.jsonl
scripts.restore: node tools/pinecone-memory.mjs restore --input backup/pinecone-memory-backup.jsonl --index openclaw-memory --namespace default --verify-write true
